news_items.headline: Scottish football fans descend on Fenway after historic World Cup win
Mascot race rudely interrupted by a visitor, who then went to play shortstop
Why Front Office And Manager Should Be Embarrassed By Today’s Game
news_items.summary: No, not because of the score, humiliating as it was, and not because of the venue, which “is what it is” and was always going to be that. It’s the decisions that were made with full knowledge of the context that make fans rightly wonder who is minding the store. The fact is, fans don’t […]

news_items.headline: Rockies erupt for franchise-record 23 runs, 6 home runs against A's in Las Vegas
news_items.summary: The A's played a six-game home stand in their future full-time home of Las Vegas this week. They capped it Sunday with a 23-9 loss to the last-place Rockies.

news_items.headline: The Rockies bats roar to life in a blisteringly hot 23-9 win over the Athletics
news_items.summary: The Rockies scored a franchise record 23 runs to avoid a sweep in Las Vegas.
